notes: Starmap. The Galaxy tab now opens with a 🗺️ Starmap - an actual node-link chart of every world you know about and the hyperlanes between them, click a node to travel there directly. It's the same lane graph that's been quietly shaping fuel costs since the last update, finally drawn instead of just read off a pill. The full card grid below is unchanged - same detail, same buttons - this is a second, more legible view onto the same map.
